name: Brain Model: Fable to Opus
goal: Change brain_model from fable to opus in config/ironclaude.json so the daemon uses an available model

tasks.name: Update brain_model config value
tasks.description: Change brain_model from fable to opus in config/ironclaude.json and stage the file

steps.description: Edit config/ironclaude.json: change brain_model from fable to opus
steps.command: echo 'Use Edit tool: old_string=brain_model fable, new_string=brain_model opus'
steps.expected: File updated with brain_model set to opus
